content: Let me look at the login handler to identify the bug.
Found the bug! The `LoginHandler` function doesn't check if `getUser()` returns nil before accessing `user.Name`. I'll add a nil check.
The bug has been fixed. I added a nil check for the user returned by `getUser()` before accessing its fields. All tests pass.
